findings.description: The pod template does not set runAsNonRoot or a numeric runAsUser.
findings.impact: A compromised container has root inside the pod and a wider blast radius.
findings.remediation: Set securityContext.runAsNonRoot: true and define a non-zero runAsUser.

findings.description: No CPU or memory limits are defined for the container.
findings.impact: A noisy workload can starve neighbours and trigger node pressure evictions.
findings.remediation: Define resources.limits and resources.requests for each container.
Add a readinessProbe that checks a lightweight health endpoint.

findings.check: Image pinned by tag, not digest
findings.remediation: Pin images by digest to guarantee immutable deployments.
